creator: rh@matriplex.com
text:
Currently, the ATM HARP system included in FreeBSD only supports the Efficient Midway and Fore PCA200E ATM cards.  The Midway cards are becoming very uncommon, and the PCA200E will soon follow.  Although the ForeLE series may also be discontinued, they are currently plentiful on ebay and probably many other places.

Fix: 

The driver was originally based on Mark Tinguely's Nicstar driver, and some of the original still exists in some places.  Most of the code is new, however, and has many improvements.  The driver and an updated atm_if.h is located at:

http://www.hodges.org/rh/code/if_idt.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: n/a
